data.content: Implementation already on main at commit 704c9e17569e (Fix scanned settings model selectors). Verified all acceptance criteria in clean worktree: static provider catalogs for Claude (5 models), Codex (8 models), and Gemini (3 models) populate pulldowns with real model rows; selected pills display actual model names via prefix-stripping (e.g. Opus 4.6 for Claude Opus 4.6); clear/remove affordances on pills call handleRemoveScannedOption to unregister; clearing last selection shows no pill. All quality gates pass: 207 test files (2370 tests), lint clean (1 pre-existing warning), tsc --noEmit clean, build succeeds.
